sentences.arabic: يَتَعَاوَنُ الْمُوَظَّفُونَ فِي الشَّرِكَةِ لِإِنْجَازِ الْمَشْرُوعِ.
sentences.translation: Zaposlenici u firmi sarađuju kako bi završili projekat.
sentences.translationEn: The employees in the company cooperate to complete the project.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُ كُلُّ فَرْدٍ أَفْكَارًا مُفِيدَةً خِلَالَ الِاجْتِمَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki pojedinac iznosi korisne ideje tokom sastanka.
sentences.translationEn: Each individual presents useful ideas during the meeting.

sentences.arabic: النَّجَاحُ يَعْتَمِدُ عَلَى التَّنْسِيقِ الْجَيِّدِ بَيْنَ الْجَمِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Uspjeh zavisi od dobre koordinacije između svih.
sentences.translationEn: Success depends on good coordination between everyone.
